{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":451277,"duration_api_ms":449974,"ttft_ms":3457,"num_turns":55,"result":"Verdict: **PASS_WITH_FINDINGS** — CP00-213 does not block pack or goal closeout.

The descriptor-only DMS-core pack is sound. Every claim in the `production_ready` chain is independently supported:
- **Consistency**: live plan, manifest, registry binding, contract projection, baseline, and validation report all agree on every attribute (incl. `source_ledger_sha`).
- **Implementation**: pure frozen-object construction, no IO/runtime/side-effects.
- **Tests**: non-vacuous — assert validity and check each leak/no-write/authority guard against concrete fields.
- **Boundaries**: Claude read-only and not final approver; no enterprise-trust-from-local-validation; Hermes is control-plane-only (no runtime receipt); CP178+ hardening criteria all present.

Zero P0/P1/P2 findings. One P3 informational note: post-review evidence artifacts (`claude-review-result.json`, `adjudication.md`, `construction-inspection.json`) aren't generated yet — expected for the pending-review stage and confirmed by the prior closed pack CP00-212.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"ac73e25d-f093-449c-a00e-f2dfcf7fc8cd","total_cost_usd":3.2498887499999993,"usage":{"input_tokens":72,"cache_creation_input_tokens":108559,"cache_read_input_tokens":3546366,"output_tokens":31866,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":108559,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":417,"cache_read_input_tokens":140530,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6374,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":6374},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001":{"inputTokens":1102,"outputTokens":20,"cacheReadInputTokens":0,"cacheCreationInputTokens":0,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.001202,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000},"claude-opus-4-8":{"inputTokens":72,"outputTokens":31866,"cacheReadInputTokens":3546366,"cacheCreationInputTokens":108559,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":3.248686749999999,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"structured_output":{"overall_verdict":"PASS_WITH_FINDINGS","blocks_pack_closeout":false,"blocks_goal_closeout":false,"no_unresolved_p0":true,"no_unresolved_p1":true,"summary":"CP00-213 is a descriptor-only RP06 DMS-core closeout pack (risk B, 40 units, RP06.P04.M03.S19-RP06.P04.M05.S14), reviewed via Read/Grep/Glob only. Cross-artifact consistency holds across the live closeout-pack-plan, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, registry binding (DMS_CORE_CP213_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS/NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION), contract current_pack and ui_secondary_slice_binding_descriptor projection, review baseline, and validation report: pack_id, risk_class B, unit_count 40, range, deliverable distribution (claude_review 4 / implementation 11 / ui 18 / security_audit 4 / fixture 1 / test 1 / hermes_evidence 1), micro-title distribution (4/22/14), upstream CP00-212 -> next CP00-214 chain, production_ready_flag dms_core_ui_secondary_slice_binding_descriptor_verified, and source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65 all agree. The CP213 implementation in service.js/validators.js/registry.js is pure frozen-object descriptor construction with no IO/runtime/side effects (no fs, network, db, process, child_process, eval, or console). Tests in model.test.js are non-vacuous: they assert coverage.valid and binding.valid === true (errors joined into the assert message), check every section row for descriptor_only=true and runtime_execution=false, and verify the state_snapshot, no_unauthorized_count_leak, claude_final_approval, no-write-attestation, and authority-boundary guards against concrete false-valued fields defined in the ROW_EXTRAS chain; the validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs script independently re-validates against the live plan. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are comprehensively attested and enforced (freezeCp213Result stamps ~40 negative attestations; validator rejects any drift). Authority boundary is correct: Claude is a read-only reviewer and not the final approver, enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation, and human approval is required to open runtime. Hermes is used only as a deterministic control-plane review-packet/receipt descriptor (gate H06, receipt_shape/evidence strings) with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false and actual runtime reserved for RP07/RP08/RP18 — it is not embedded in product runtime. CP178+ review hardening forbidden_review_evidence covers auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, and tool_call_shaped_output (plus final-approval/source-mutation/enterprise-trust claims). production_ready is correctly false in the implemented_pending_review state; this review is the gate. No P0/P1/P2 issues found and the pack-level production_ready claim is well-supported; one P3 informational note records that the post-review evidence artifacts are not yet present, which is expected for pending-review and confirmed by prior closed pack CP00-212.","findings":[{"id":"C-213-01","severity":"P3","title":"Post-review evidence artifacts not yet present at review time (expected, non-blocking)","file":"docs/closeout-packs/cp00-213/manifest.json","line":1656,"details":"The manifest's required_pack_artifacts and every per-unit evidence_refs list cite docs/closeout-packs/cp00-213/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist in that directory at review time. This is consistent with the pending-review state (status=implemented_pending_review, production_ready=false) and the documented hardened_review_sequence, in which adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation produce those files from the accepted review. The prior already-closed pack CP00-212 contains all three artifacts, confirming the expected flow.
